bird.name: Newell's shearwater
bird.summary: Newell's shearwater or Hawaiian shearwater (ʻaʻo), (Puffinus newelli) is a seabird in the family Procellariidae. It belongs to a confusing…

locations.name: 夏威夷群島
locations.summary: 夏威夷群島（英語：Hawaiian Islands），舊稱桑威奇群岛、山域治埃蘭（Sandwich Islands），太平洋中北部的岛群，波利尼西亚群岛的一部分，是由19個较大的島嶼和其他小岛組成的群島，成因多为火山岛或珊瑚岛。 夏威夷群…

relations.subject: Newell's shearwater
relations.evidence: It breeds in at least 20 colonies on mountain slopes in the Hawaiian Islands

relations.subject: Newell's shearwater
relations.evidence: It has declined due to habitat loss and predation by introduced species such as mongooses, rats, cats and barn owls.{{Cite web|last=Platt |first=John R
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
